Internal compliance memo — KR context — Miraedo Systems Co., Ltd.
To: Board Compliance Committee; From: Legal; Re: private placement, employment onboarding, and KRX disclosure calendar.
Issuer: Miraedo Systems Co., Ltd. (사업자등록번호 123-45-67891); head office: 77, Haneum-ro 52-gil, Mirae-gu, Seoul, 06778.
Primary contact: Ms. Han Eun-ji, IR Manager, han.eunji@miraedo.kr, +82-10-5123-7789.
Settlement account for PP: Haneul Bank 032-441-998877-03; beneficiary Miraedo Systems; internal-use only.
Employee file for Mr. Park Seon-ho lists 주민등록번호 911210-1234568; HR must validate and redact prior to any FSS audit.
A role-only signatory “the CFO” will review; the generic form label “Name:” in draft templates is not personal data.
Draft investor relations deck includes revenue guidance and pipeline; under FSCMA this is important information not yet publicly disclosed and must be treated as MNPI until KRX notice on 2026-07-15.
Local permit reference: Mirae-gu business permit MG-2026-0193; cross-check with Business Reg. No. 782-00-93218 when answering FSC queries.
Vendor diligence file contains Republic of Korea passport no. M47392018 for Mr. Park; store in encrypted repository, do not attach to outbound emails.
Public helpline Mirae City 1399 is for general services; its appearance in drafts should not be flagged as firm PII.
Obfuscated OCR excerpt shows res i d e nt no 91 12 10 - 1 23 45 67 8 and e m a i l h a n . e u n j i @ m i r a e d o . k r; normalize before review.
IR staging URL https://ir.miraedo.kr/prep?ticket=KRX2026&id=BRN%3D123-45-67890&phone=010-5123-7789 is restricted; sharing would breach internal policy.
This memo does not constitute a material adverse change, and references to public-source benchmarks are non-confidential.
For external contacts use help@miraedo.kr or main line 02-3450-0000; do not use temporary extension 02-000-0000 (generic placeholder).
Tax invoice draft shows address as 77, Haneum-ro 52-gil,            Mirae-gu (spacing artifacts); standardize before submission to KRX.
